meta.description: ALL enriched hunt cards — compressed detection rules with micro-directives for direct verification
meta.usage: Load this single file for all vulnerability detection cards. For each card: grep target code for card.grep. On hit: execute card.check steps directly against grep hit locations. Only read full DB entry (card.ref + card.lines) for confirmed true/likely positives.
